name: Goblin Sniper
description: A crafty goblin who prefers to attack from range, pelting foes with arrows from hidden positions.

name: Goblin Warrior
description: A skittish but vicious goblin who fights in packs, darting in to stab before retreating.

name: Kobold Alchemist
description: This kobold hurls volatile concoctions that burst into fire or acid on impact.

name: Bandit Captain
description: A seasoned outlaw who commands a gang of thugs. Their tactical cunning makes them a dangerous foe.

name: Ogre Bruiser
description: A massive, ill-tempered brute who smashes anything in reach with a gnarled club.

name: Time Raider Chronoguard
description: These alien warriors phase through time, appearing where least expected to strike with devastating precision.
